howItWorks.intro: This room paint calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.
rules: Gallons = (Wall Area - Doors - Windows) × Coats / 350 sq ft
howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates. Consult a professional for critical decisions.

faq.question: How much paint do I need?
faq.answer: One gallon of paint covers approximately 350 sq ft. Most rooms need 2 coats, so a 12x14 room needs about 2-3 gallons.

howWeCalculate.intro: This room paint calculator uses established formulas and current data to provide accurate estimates.
steps: Enter your specific values into the calculator fields above
Our algorithm applies the relevant formulas using your inputs
Results are calculated instantly in your browser — nothing is sent to a server
Review the detailed breakdown to understand how each factor affects your result
